abilities.name: hyper-cutter
abilities.shortEffect: Prevents Attack from being lowered by other Pokémon.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's Attack cannot be lowered by other Pokémon. This ability does not prevent any Attack losses other than stat modifiers, such as the Attack cut from a burn. This Pokémon can still be passed negative Attack modifiers through Heart Swap or Power Swap.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's prized, mighty pincers prevent other Pokémon from lowering its Attack stat.

abilities.name: iron-fist
abilities.shortEffect: Strengthens punch-based moves to 1.2× their power.
abilities.effect: Moves flagged as being punch-based have 1.2× their base power for this Pokémon. Sucker Punch is not flagged as punch-based; its original, Japanese name only means "surprise attack".

abilities.name: anger-point
abilities.shortEffect: Raises Attack to the maximum of six stages upon receiving a critical hit.
abilities.effect: Whenever this Pokémon receives a critical hit, its Attack rises to the maximum of 6 stages. This ability will still take effect if the critical hit is received by a Substitute.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon is angered when it takes a critical hit, and that maxes its Attack stat.
